id.description: The id of this key, it is used for authorization.

type.title: The type of key, it can be app_specific_key (default) or personal_access_token

scopes.title: The low-level scopes this key has

endpoints.title: The endpoint-level scopes this key has

apps.description:
The apps that this key give you access to, it is empty if this key is personal_access_token
API key can only give you access to a single app.

created_at.title:
When the key was created. We follow the XXXX timestamp
format. We use https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format:
"2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z" so you can expect results like
the following from the API:
"2017-04-11T21:50:50.223962Z"

expires_at.title: When does the key expires, the key won't expire if this is empty

authorized_idp_ids.title: list of idp ids at which key is currently authorized

organization_id.description: The organization associated with the key, if any. This is applicable only for PAT keys.
